home.awards_subtitle: Categories will be awarded to the TOP outstanding individuals.
home.kudos_description: A recognition and appreciation activity for colleagues — held for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation on the system announced by the organizing committee. This will serve as material for the Heads to reference when selecting award winners.
home.content.p1: Facing the rapid changes of the AI era and increasingly high expectations from clients, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying capabilities — not only striving to become elite in its own field, but also aiming for a higher goal where every Sunner is a "problem-solver": an expert in resolving all challenges, finding solutions for every project, client, and societal need.
home.content.p2: Inspired by diverse capabilities, flexible growth, and the spirit of digging deeper to break through in the AI era, "Root Further" was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025 ceremony.
home.content.p3: Going beyond its surface meaning, "Root Further" is the journey of continuously reaching further, rooting deeper, touching the hidden geological layers to survive, rise, and nurture the ever-burning passion for creating value at Sun*. Envisioning roots continuously plunging deep into the earth, powerfully weaving through layers of sediment to absorb the finest essence, Sun* people are also absorbing nutrients from the era and market challenges to reinvent themselves every day, expanding capabilities and firmly taking root in the AI era — a completely new, complex, and unpredictable geological layer, yet one brimming with immense potential and opportunity.
home.content.p4: In the face of storms, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization with individuals confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and masters of change — is an organization that not only stands firm against turbulence, but also leverages every strength and dares to break boundaries. More than just a program name on each organizational development journey, "Root Further" is a call to action, encouraging each of us to believe in ourselves, dare to dig deep, unlock all potential, dare to break limits, and dare to become the most versatile and excellent version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, diverse capabilities and leveraging the power of the times are prerequisites for endurance.
home.content.p5: No one knows in advance how many mysterious geological layers lie deep within the earth of modern technology and markets. We only know that when "Root Further" has become our core spirit, we will not be afraid, but rather feel excited before any uncharted territory on the journey forward. Because we always believe that within those infinite realms, wonders and opportunities for growth await us.
home.content.quote: A tree with deep roots fears no storm
notification.title: Notifications
awards.kudos_description:
NEW IN SAA 2025
A recognition and appreciation activity for colleagues — held for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in July 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation on the system announced by the organizing committee. This will serve as material for the Heads Council to reference when selecting award winners.
kudos.input_placeholder: Who do you want to appreciate and recognize today?

kudos.write.modal_title: Send appreciation and recognition to your teammate
kudos.write.title_hint:
Example: The one who inspires me.
The title will be displayed as the heading of your Kudos.
kudos.write.content_placeholder: Write your appreciation and recognition to your teammate!
kudos.write.content_hint: You can "@ + name" to mention other colleagues
